title: Falsify Invariant: Induce divergent ForkDigestValues across nodes for identical fork version

phase1.abstract_states: Fork digest = first 4 bytes of hash. Pre-fulu: simple ForkDataRoot. Fulu+: XOR of ForkDataRoot with hash(blobParameters.epoch || blobParameters.maxBlobsPerBlock).
boundary_conditions: Blob parameters must be available for fulu+ epochs

phase2.attack_surface: Fork digest mismatch could cause network partition
constraints: Deterministic from config + genesisValidatorsRoot

phase3.reasoning: computeForkDigest correctly branches on ForkSeq.fulu. For pre-fulu: standard 4-byte slice. For fulu+: XORs with digest of epoch+maxBlobsPerBlock to incorporate blob schedule into fork identity. This ensures nodes with different blob schedules naturally partition. Implementation follows EIP-7892 spec.
